message: '        "description": "FAQ items from API: [{ id, question, answer }]."\n' +
`        "description": "Callback invoked when user toggles billing period; receives next value ('monthly'|'yearly')."\n` +
'    "purpose": "Single accessible accordion row for a question/answer pair.",\n' +
'        "description": "Optional FAQ item id to have open by default."\n' +
'        "description": "Callback invoked when header is clicked/activated; receives id."\n' +
'        "description": "If true, multiple accordion items can be open at once; defaults to false."\n' +
'    "renderLogic": "Renders a button-like header row with a chevron indicator; when isOpen is true, shows the answer panel below with proper aria attributes and collapsible styling."\n' +
'    "renderLogic": "Renders a FAQ heading and a vertical list of AccordionItem components; manages which item(s) are open based on allowMultipleOpen and user interaction."\n' +

'  "appRoot": "App.jsx renders a single top-level page container that mounts PricingPage as the primary view for NebulaDrive pricing. App passes required API endpoints (pricingEndpoint, faqEndpoint) and optionally defaultBillingPeriod into PricingPage; all other UI (billing toggle, tier cards, comparison table, and FAQ accordions) is composed within PricingPage based on fetched data and local UI state.",\n' +

'  "stateManagement": "State is localized to PricingPage for cross-section concerns (billingPeriod, pricingData, faqItems, loading, error). PricingPage drills billingPeriod and fetched tier/feature/FAQ data down via props: BillingToggle receives value/onChange to update billingPeriod; PricingTierGrid receives tiers + billingPeriod and renders PricingCard children; FeatureComparisonTable receives tiers + featureGroups; FAQSection receives items and internally manages open/close state for AccordionItem components. Optional callbacks (onSelectTier/onCtaClick) can bubble user actions back up to PricingPage if needed.",\n' +

`  "navigationStrategy": "No routing required: App renders a single PricingPage view. If future navigation is needed, add react-router and route '/' (or '/pricing') to PricingPage while keeping PricingPage as the composed page-level container.",\n` +

'  "stateManagementStrategy": "Use useState/useEffect inside PricingPage for data fetching and billingPeriod (single source of truth). Keep accordion open state inside FAQSection (useState with openIds). Prefer props drilling for this small tree; introduce React Context only if billingPeriod or pricing data must be consumed by unrelated branches outside PricingPage."\n' +
'          "purpose": "Fetch structured feature comparison data for the table."\n' +
'          "purpose": "Fetch pricing tiers and their monthly/yearly prices, plus tier metadata (e.g., mostPopular) and included highlights."\n' +

`      "notes": "Expected response shape: { billingPeriods: ['monthly','yearly'], currency: 'USD', tiers: [{ id:'basic'|'pro'|'enterprise', name, description, mostPopular:boolean, ctaLabel, prices:{ monthly:number, yearly:number }, highlights:string[] }] }"\n` +

`      "notes": "Expected response shape: { tiers:['Basic','Pro','Enterprise'], sections:[{ title:string, rows:[{ feature:string, values:{ basic:boolean|string|number, pro:boolean|string|number, enterprise:boolean|string|number } }] }] }"\n` +
'      "purpose": "Sets up routing and global providers (React Query). Renders the PricingPage as the primary landing page."\n' +
'          "purpose": "Fetch FAQ items (question/answer pairs) for the accordion section."\n' +
'      "notes": "Expected response shape: { items:[{ id:string, question:string, answerHtml?:string, answerText?:string }] }"\n' +
'      "purpose": "Top hero/header area for the pricing page with NebulaDrive branding, headline, subheadline, and optional trust text."\n' +
'      "purpose": "Wraps the app with QueryClientProvider and any future global contexts."\n' +
'      "purpose": "Main page layout for NebulaDrive pricing: header, billing toggle, tier cards, feature comparison table, and FAQ section; orchestrates data fetching and UI state."\n' +
'      "purpose": "Provides consistent page padding, max-width container, and vertical section spacing for a professional landing page layout."\n' +
'      "purpose": "Monthly/Yearly toggle switch component that updates billing period in parent state with zero-lag toggling after initial fetch."\n' +
'      "purpose": "Reusable section wrapper with title, subtitle, and anchor id for Pricing, Features, and FAQ sections."\n' +
'      "purpose": "Renders the 3 tier cards in a responsive grid and passes billing period/prices to each card."\n' +
`      "purpose": "Displays a pricing tier (name, description, price based on billing period, highlights list, CTA). Visually highlights Pro as 'Most Popular' with a distinct border and badge."\n` +
`      "purpose": "Small badge/pill label used to mark the Pro tier as 'Most Popular'."\n` +
'      "purpose": "Formats and displays price amount and period label (e.g., $10/mo or $100/yr) and optional savings text for yearly billing."\n' +
`      "purpose": "Reusable CTA button styling for 'Start Free Trial', 'Get Started', or 'Contact Sales' actions on tier cards."\n` +
'      "purpose": "Fetches and renders a detailed feature comparison section with table, tier headings, and section groupings."\n' +
`      "purpose": "Lightweight inline SVG icon for boolean 'included' values in the comparison table and tier highlights."\n` +
'      "purpose": "Accessible comparison table rendering with sticky first column on desktop, responsive behavior on mobile, and clear tier columns."\n' +
`      "purpose": "Lightweight inline SVG icon for boolean 'not included' values in the comparison table."\n` +
'      "purpose": "Renders an individual feature row, formatting boolean values as checkmarks/dashes and text/limits as strings."\n' +
'      "purpose": "Fetches FAQ items from API and renders them in an accordion list with accessible keyboard interactions."\n' +
'      "purpose": "Controlled/uncontrolled accordion container supporting single-open or multi-open behavior for FAQs."\n' +
'      "purpose": "Individual FAQ accordion item with button header, expand/collapse animation, and ARIA attributes."\n' +
'      "purpose": "Unified loading UI for async API states (skeletons/spinners) used for pricing, features, and FAQ."\n' +
'      "purpose": "Custom hook using React Query to fetch FAQ items from /faq."\n' +
'      "purpose": "Unified error UI with retry button, used when pricing/features/FAQ fetching fails."\n' +
'      "purpose": "Custom hook using React Query to fetch comparison data from /features/compare."\n' +
'      "purpose": "Custom hook using React Query to fetch pricing data from /pricing and provide normalized tier objects."\n' +
